# Pull Request

## Description
Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)

## Changes Made
- [ ] Change 1
- [ ] Change 2
- [ ] Change 3

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots to help explain your changes, especially for UI modifications.

## Testing
- [ ] I have tested these changes locally
- [ ] I have tested on multiple Android versions (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested the accessibility service functionality (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests (if applicable)

## Device Testing
Please list the devices and Android versions you've tested on:
- Device 1: [Device name] - Android [version]
- Device 2: [Device name] - Android [version]

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Privacy and Security
- [ ] This change does not introduce any data collection or tracking
- [ ] This change does not require additional permissions (or permissions are justified)
- [ ] This change maintains the app's privacy-first approach
- [ ] This change does not introduce security vulnerabilities

## Additional Notes
Add any additional notes or context about the PR here.
